# Sunrise Roofers LLC - Tucson, Arizona
> Professional Roofing Services in Tucson and Surrounding Areas

## Business Overview
Founded in 2025 by Eddie and Viky Guillen, Sunrise Roofers LLC is a family-owned, professional roofing company serving Tucson, Arizona and surrounding communities including Catalina Foothills, Oro Valley, Marana, Sahuarita, Green Valley, Vail, and Rita Ranch. Our team brings over 20 years of roofing expertise, specializing in residential and commercial roofing solutions designed for Arizona's extreme climate conditions.

## Core Services
- Roof Replacement: Complete roof replacement services for all types of roofing materials using Arizona-tested materials built to withstand extreme heat and monsoon seasons
- Roof Repair: Fast, reliable roof repairs for leaks, storm damage, and wear with emergency service available
- Roof Inspection: Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential issues with honest assessments and free estimates
- Shingle Roofing: Professional asphalt shingle installation using top brands like GAF, Owens Corning, and CertainTeed with UV protection
- Tile Roofing: Specialized concrete and clay tile installation perfect for Arizona's climate, lasting 30+ years
- Metal Roofing: Energy-efficient metal roof installation that reduces cooling costs by up to 30%, lasting 50+ years and withstanding monsoon winds
- Flat Roof Coating & TPO Roofing: Expert flat roof services including TPO installation, protective coatings, and restoration using premium materials from Polyglass, Johns Manville, and Tucson Rubberized Coating
- Emergency Roof Repair: 24/7 emergency roof repair in Tucson with same-day response, emergency tarping/dry-in, and permanent repairs after leaks and storm damage
- Tile Roof Repair: Repair of cracked, slipped, and broken concrete, clay, and sandcast tiles, plus flashing leaks and underlayment renewal
- Foam (SPF) Roofing: Seamless, reflective spray polyurethane foam roofing — installation, repair, and recoating for flat and low-slope roofs

## Service Areas
- Tucson, AZ (Primary)
- Catalina Foothills
- Oro Valley
- Marana
- Sahuarita
- Green Valley
- Vail
- Rita Ranch

## Key Certifications & Partnerships
- GAF Certified
- BBB Accredited
- Licensed, bonded, and insured
- Manufacturer-certified installers

## Business Features
- Free estimates and consultations
- Emergency service available
- Same-day emergency repairs
- Licensed, bonded, and insured (ROC #358079)
- Manufacturer warranties on materials
- Workmanship guarantees
- Financing options available
- 20+ years of roofing expertise

## Climate Specialization
Arizona's unique climate demands specialized roofing solutions:
- Extreme heat resistance (120°F+ summer temperatures)
- UV protection and reflective coatings
- Monsoon wind and hail resistance
- Energy-efficient solutions to reduce cooling costs
- Materials rated for desert environments
